productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men New Navy Clear White Sandal
description: CompositionNavy blue slides with quick drying, adjustable PVC upper, massage knobs along the footbed and multi directional rubber outsole with polyurethane footbedWash care1. Remove dust with soft, clean, damp cloth2. Do not machine washMade for that after swim relaxation, these slides from adidas are made of quick drying uppers that ensure your feet are kept dry and safe after a good round of water Sports. What comes as a cherry on the icing is the full length massage footbed that rejuvenates your tired feet, while the adjustable PVC upper ensures a customized Fit. The rubber outsole with multi directional grooves ensures that water drains away when walking on damp surface, lending supreme grip and stability. Pair this with jeans for a stylish look.
